scene: A doodle stick figure sitting at a desk cracking its knuckles with a determined face, a single glowing important paper task sitting on the desk in front of it. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure frantically scrubbing a sparkling clean kitchen counter with a sponge, suds and shine sparkles flying everywhere, overly focused. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure intensely lining up little spice jars in a perfect row on a rack, tongue poking out in deep concentration. Flat warm orange background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure slumped on the floor surrounded by cleaning supplies and tidy organized piles, a grey guilt storm cloud hanging over its head, while the glowing untouched task still sits on a desk behind it. Flat muted purple background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure facing forward shrugging with palms up and a big red question mark above its head, the glowing task paper beside it. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
